cases.description: MONTH applied to a constructed date
MONTH applied directly to the raw serial number 1 (Jan 1, 1900)
cases.expected_note: Serial 1 is Jan 1, 1900 in the 1900 date system

cases.description: A serial with a fractional (time-of-day) component still resolves to the correct calendar month
cases.expected_note: 45366 = 2024-03-15; the .75 fractional day is ignored by MONTH
